languages.text: {n}Триасомата замирает, позволяя вам провести осмотр. Вы обрабатываете раны и места стыка имплантов с плотью антисептическими мазями и точечно применяете стимуляторы, чтобы облегчить болевой синдром. Лихорадочное дыхание мужчины выравнивается.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Триасомата замирает, позволяя вам провести осмотр. Вы обрабатываете раны и места стыка имплантов с плотью антисептическими мазями и точечно применяете стимуляторы, чтобы облегчить болевой синдром. Лихорадочное дыхание мужчины выравнивается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

languages.text: {n}トリアスモータが静まり、彼を調べることができる。傷とインプラントが肉と接する部分を消毒薬で治療し、痛みを和らげるために刺激薬を塗布する。彼の激しく乱れた呼吸が落ち着き始める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

traits.locale_text: トリアスモータが静まり、彼を調べることができる。傷とインプラントが肉と接する部分を消毒薬で治療し、痛みを和らげるために刺激薬を塗布する。彼の激しく乱れた呼吸が落ち着き始める。

languages.text: {n}三相体安静了下来，任由你检查。你用消毒药膏处理了伤口，以及植入物与血肉的接合处，并注射了靶向兴奋剂来减轻他的疼痛。他狂乱的呼吸渐趋平稳。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}三相体安静了下来，任由你检查。你用消毒药膏处理了伤口，以及植入物与血肉的接合处，并注射了靶向兴奋剂来减轻他的疼痛。他狂乱的呼吸渐趋平稳。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le Triasomata s'immobilise pour vous permettre de l'examiner. Vous appliquez des onguents antiseptiques sur ses blessures et les jonctions entre les implants et la chair, puis lui injectez des stimulants ciblés pour soulager la douleur. Sa respiration saccadée commence à se faire plus régulière.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Triasomata s'immobilise pour vous permettre de l'examiner. Vous appliquez des onguents antiseptiques sur ses blessures et les jonctions entre les implants et la chair, puis lui injectez des stimulants ciblés pour soulager la douleur. Sa respiration saccadée commence à se faire plus régulière.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El triasómata se queda inmóvil, lo que te permite examinarlo. Tratas sus heridas y los puntos donde los implantes se unen a la carne con ungüentos antisépticos y le aplicas estimulantes localizados para aliviar el dolor. Su respiración descontrolada empieza a estabilizarse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El triasómata se queda inmóvil, lo que te permite examinarlo. Tratas sus heridas y los puntos donde los implantes se unen a la carne con ungüentos antisépticos y le aplicas estimulantes localizados para aliviar el dolor. Su respiración descontrolada empieza a estabilizarse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Üçyeköz, hareketsiz kalıp onu incelemene izin veriyor. Yaralarını ve implantın etle birleştiği yerleri antiseptik merhemlerle iyi ediyor, acısını hafifletmek için hedefli uyarıcılar veriyorsun. Çılgınca alıp verdiği nefes, düzene girmeye başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Üçyeköz, hareketsiz kalıp onu incelemene izin veriyor. Yaralarını ve implantın etle birleştiği yerleri antiseptik merhemlerle iyi ediyor, acısını hafifletmek için hedefli uyarıcılar veriyorsun. Çılgınca alıp verdiği nefes, düzene girmeye başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Triasomata verstummt und lässt zu, dass du ihn untersuchst. Du behandelst seine Wunden und die Stellen, an denen Implantate auf Fleisch treffen, mit antiseptischen Salben und linderst seine Schmerzen mit Stimulanzien. Schließlich beruhigt sich seine hektische Atmung.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Triasomata verstummt und lässt zu, dass du ihn untersuchst. Du behandelst seine Wunden und die Stellen, an denen Implantate auf Fleisch treffen, mit antiseptischen Salben und linderst seine Schmerzen mit Stimulanzien. Schließlich beruhigt sich seine hektische Atmung.{/n}
